body: "Details of the application  Bewley Homes PLC has applied to the Environment Agency for a licence.  The Environment Agency is giving notice of this application in accordance with Section 37 of the Water Resources Act 1991 and Regulation 6 of the Water Resources (Abstraction and Impounding) Regulations 2006.  The application is for a licence to abstract water from Beenham Grange Gravel Member underground strata within an area defined by National Grid References SU 44835 63407, SU 45329 63391, SU 45050 63061 and SU 44808 63122 to transfer it to River Enborne at National Grid Reference SU 45133 63332 without intervening use.  The application is to abstract water as follows:   27.72 cubic metres an hour 665.28 cubic metres a day 242,827.2 cubic metres a year between 2025 and 2035 inclusive.   The water will be used for dewatering as part of construction.  Further details are: the proposed abstraction lies within the Kennet and Vale of White Horse Catchment Abstraction Licensing Strategy reporting area.  How to view the application  Please contact us via email or use the number below to arrange to see the application documents.  How to comment on the application  Send any representations about this application in writing, quoting the name of the applicant and Reference Number NPS/WR/044125 to the Environment Agency, at the Permitting and Support Centre, Water Resources Team, Quadrant 2, 99 Parkway Avenue, Sheffield, S9 4WF or by email to PSC-WaterResources@environment-agency.gov.uk  By 21 August 2025.  For advice about how to make a representation call 03708 506 506. "
